CustomField.formula: If(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c < $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2014_Start__c, TEXT(YEAR($Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2014_Start__c)), If(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c < $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2015_Start__c, TEXT(YEAR($Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2015_Start__c)), If(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c < $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2016_Start__c, TEXT(YEAR($Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2016_Start__c)), If(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c < $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2017_Start__c, TEXT(YEAR($Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2017_Start__c)), If(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c < $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2018_Start__c, TEXT(YEAR($Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2018_Start__c)), If(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c < $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2019_Start__c, TEXT(YEAR($Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2019_Start__c)),"N/A"))))))
CustomField.label: First Approved 2014+ Increase Year
